name: Minimum Accumulated Earnings Credit

eligibility.description: Available to most C corporations; service corporations in health, law, engineering, architecture, accounting, actuarial science, performing arts, or consulting are limited to a $150,000 threshold.

description: Allows corporations to accumulate up to $250,000 ($150,000 for certain service corporations) in earnings and profits without being subject to the 20% accumulated earnings tax, regardless of business necessity.
